description: Phase MKT-3: Custom domains (asklily.health + ask-lily.io + lilycare.co) + Gmail SMTP relay + TinaCMS cloud editing

stories.title: LinkedIn URL fix in SiteFooter
acceptanceCriteria: Footer LinkedIn href points to linkedin.com/company/asklilyhealth
Link opens in new tab
No broken social links in SiteFooter

stories.title: Add 5 new icons to Icon component (arrow-left, arrow-right, x, building, phone)
acceptanceCriteria: Icon component supports: arrow-left, arrow-right, x, building, phone
Icons render correctly at all standard sizes
TypeScript types updated for new icon names

stories.title: MobileAppShowcase component — 3 phone-frame mockups
acceptanceCriteria: MobileAppShowcase renders 3 phone-frame cards
Each frame contains app screen mockup content
Responsive layout works on mobile and desktop
Component ported from design reference 07-mobile.jsx

stories.title: ProductTour component — 14-tile slideshow with keyboard nav
acceptanceCriteria: ProductTour renders 14 feature tiles in a slideshow layout
Keyboard navigation (arrow keys) advances/retreats slides
Active tile highlighted, progress indicator visible
Component ported from design reference 08-tour.jsx

stories.title: Wire ProductTour + MobileAppShowcase into homepage
acceptanceCriteria: Homepage index.astro imports and renders ProductTour
Homepage index.astro imports and renders MobileAppShowcase
Sections appear in correct visual order
No hydration errors in browser console

stories.title: Fix ProductTour reveal opacity (remove .reveal class dependency)
acceptanceCriteria: ProductTour tiles visible without requiring .reveal CSS class
Tiles do not flash invisible on mount
Opacity defaults to 1 when .reveal class is absent

stories.title: Orbit animation fix — photo stays static, badge ring animates
acceptanceCriteria: Center photo/avatar in Orbit component does not rotate or animate
Badge ring orbits around the static center photo
Animation is smooth with no jank
Hover state triggers pill expansion on badges only

stories.title: MobileAppShowcase glassmorphic phone frames with multi-stop sheen gradient
acceptanceCriteria: .app-frame uses multi-stop linear-gradient sheen (8 stops, 165deg)
backdrop-filter blur(28px) saturate(160%) applied
Inset highlight shadow on top edge, depth shadow below
Hover lifts frame with translateY(-6px) and deeper shadow
Each app caption shows icon + role label + product name
Deployed to lively-plant-0efee6f0f.7.azurestaticapps.net

stories.title: SiteNav role-specific product logos + ALPHA + animated WAITLIST OPEN badges
acceptanceCriteria: Members (/members): lily-icon-multi.png + 'care' subscript inline
Practitioners (/practitioners): lily-icon-green.png + 'Lily' text + 'practice' subscript
Organizations (/organizations): lily-icon-fullcolor.png + 'Lily' text + 'admin' subscript
Homepage (/): lily-wordmark-multi.png (unchanged)
ALPHA badge (green outlined pill) visible on all pages
WAITLIST OPEN badge with pulsing CSS dot animation (1.6s ease-in-out) on all pages
Separator line between logo group and badge cluster
Deployed to lively-plant-0efee6f0f.7.azurestaticapps.net

stories.title: GoDaddy DNS — CNAME + TXT verification for asklily.health → Azure SWA
acceptanceCriteria: CNAME record: asklily.health → lively-plant-0efee6f0f.7.azurestaticapps.net
TXT verification record added as required by Azure SWA custom domain wizard
Records saved in GoDaddy DNS manager
TTL set to 600 (10 min) for faster propagation

stories.title: GoDaddy DNS — CNAME + TXT verification for ask-lily.io → Azure SWA
acceptanceCriteria: CNAME record: ask-lily.io → lively-plant-0efee6f0f.7.azurestaticapps.net
TXT verification record added as required by Azure SWA custom domain wizard
Records saved in GoDaddy DNS manager
TTL set to 600 (10 min) for faster propagation

stories.title: Azure SWA — Add custom domain asklily.health (canonical)
acceptanceCriteria: az staticwebapp hostname set --name lily-marketing-site --hostname asklily.health succeeds
Azure portal shows asklily.health with Valid status
SSL certificate provisioned automatically (Let's Encrypt via Azure)
https://asklily.health serves lily-marketing content

stories.title: Azure SWA — Add custom domain ask-lily.io (alias with 301 redirect)
acceptanceCriteria: az staticwebapp hostname set --name lily-marketing-site --hostname ask-lily.io succeeds
Azure portal shows ask-lily.io with Valid status
SSL certificate provisioned for ask-lily.io
https://ask-lily.io serves content (redirect handled by staticwebapp.config.json)

stories.title: lily-marketing code — update astro.config.mjs site URL + staticwebapp.config.json
acceptanceCriteria: astro.config.mjs: site set to 'https://asklily.health'
staticwebapp.config.json: 301 redirect rule from ask-lily.io/* → https://asklily.health/{rest}
Build passes: npx astro build succeeds with no errors
Deployed to production SWA with updated config

stories.title: Google Workspace Admin — configure SMTP relay service
acceptanceCriteria: SMTP relay service enabled in Google Workspace Admin > Apps > Google Workspace > Gmail > SMTP relay service
Allowed senders: any addresses in my domain
Authentication: require SMTP Auth
Encryption: require TLS
SMTP relay host: smtp-relay.gmail.com port 587
Saved and active

stories.title: GoDaddy DNS — SPF/DKIM/DMARC records for email authentication
acceptanceCriteria: SPF TXT record on safespacegt.com includes include:_spf.google.com
DKIM CNAME records added (from Google Workspace Admin DKIM setup)
DMARC TXT record: v=DMARC1; p=none; rua=mailto:admin@safespacegt.com
All records saved in GoDaddy DNS manager

stories.title: GoDaddy domain forwarding — lilycare.co → asklily.health/members (301)
stories.note: lilycare.co uses GoDaddy domain forwarding (not Azure SWA custom domain) because it redirects to a sub-path (/members) which Azure SWA redirect-type custom domains don't support
acceptanceCriteria: GoDaddy domain forwarding enabled for lilycare.co → https://asklily.health/members (301 permanent)
Forwarding with masking disabled (clean 301, not iframe)
https://lilycare.co/anything redirects to https://asklily.health/members
Setting saved in GoDaddy domain management

stories.title: Azure SWA — Add custom domain ask-lily.io as redirect type (301 → asklily.health)
stories.note: Azure SWA supports redirect-type custom domains which 301 to the primary domain. ask-lily.io added as redirect type pointing to asklily.health.
acceptanceCriteria: ask-lily.io added as redirect custom domain in Azure SWA portal (Redirect type, not direct)
Azure portal shows ask-lily.io pointing to asklily.health with redirect
https://ask-lily.io 301 redirects to https://asklily.health
SSL certificate valid for ask-lily.io

stories.title: Google Workspace Admin — add and verify all 3 custom domains (asklily.health, ask-lily.io, lilycare.co)
acceptanceCriteria: asklily.health added as primary domain in GWS Admin → Domains
ask-lily.io added as domain alias in GWS Admin
lilycare.co added as domain alias in GWS Admin
TXT domain verification records for all 3 added in GoDaddy DNS
All 3 domains show Verified status in GWS Admin console

stories.title: TinaCMS — configure cloud editing via TINA_CLIENT_ID + TINA_TOKEN in Azure SWA
acceptanceCriteria: TINA_CLIENT_ID added to Azure SWA environment variables (lily-marketing-site)
TINA_TOKEN added to Azure SWA environment variables
npx astro build passes with TinaCMS cloud config
https://asklily.health/admin loads TinaCMS editing interface after deployment

stories.title: Verification — all domains resolve, SSL active, redirects work
acceptanceCriteria: https://asklily.health loads lily-marketing homepage (200, no SSL warnings)
https://ask-lily.io redirects 301 to https://asklily.health
https://lilycare.co redirects 301 to https://asklily.health/members
SSL certificates valid for all 3 domains
Lighthouse accessibility score ≥ 90 on asklily.health
No mixed content warnings in browser console

stories.title: SMTP relay test — send email from alphonso.nathan@safespacegt.com via relay
acceptanceCriteria: Test email sent from alphonso.nathan@safespacegt.com via smtp-relay.gmail.com:587
Email received with no spam flag
DKIM signature passes (check email headers)
SPF passes (check email headers)
DMARC policy passes
